item.title: Automated Defect Recognition & AI in Digital Radiography
item.description: Explore the latest in Automated Defect Recognition and AI in Digital Radiography. Enhance inspection accuracy and efficiency. Register now!

item.title: Webinar: Preventing Critical Misses in Defect Detection
item.description: Join technical experts from Voxel51 and MongoDB to explore a data-centric approach to defect detection.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026
item.description: We kicked off 2026 with our first webinar of the year, Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026. The goal was simple. Look ahead at what is changing in machine vision, and talk honestly about why so many AI inspection projects still struggle to move beyond pilots and into full scale production.

item.title: Expert-to-Expert Webinar on Zero-Defect Manufacturing
item.description: The IDEALIST project is organising a new Expert-to-Expert webinar focused on Zero-Defect Manufacturing, bringing together industry professionals to discuss innovative approaches to advanced quality assurance in manufacturing. Expert-to-Expert webinars are one of the key formats through which IDEALIST supports manufacturing companies in exploring advanced technologies through peer-to-peer knowledge exchange. Hosted on the AGORA platform, these online sessions provide a space for experts and practitioners to share real use cases and practical solutions for industrial production.

item.title: Void inspection in manufacturing with AXI: everything you need to know.
item.description: Discover how Multi Line AXI reliably detects voids in 3D volumes, identifies defects at an early stage and makes your production more efficient and secure. State-of-the-art AXI technology for maximum quality in electronics production!

item.title: From voids to head-in-pillow: reliably detecting BGA defects with AXI
item.description: Inspect BGAs reliably in line with the production cycle: Experience how Multi Line AXI tests BGAs in 3D volume, automatically detects voids, head-in-pillow and short circuits, thereby reducing scrap – for stable processes and maximum manufacturing quality.

item.title: Altus and Koh Young to Host Webinar Showcasing AI Applications in Inspection Software - What's New in Electronics
item.description: Altus Group, a distributor of capital equipment for the electronics manufacturing industry in the UK and Ireland, and Koh Young Technology, a global provider of True 3D measurement-based inspection systems, will host a technical webinar on 28 April 2026 showcasing how artificial intelligence (AI) is being applied within inspection software to improve process control and [...]
